scripts.test: node test/health.test.js && node test/api.test.js && node test/api-aliases.test.js && node test/auth-persistence.test.js && node test/site-commerce-smoke.test.js && node test/zac.test.js && node test/btc.test.js && node test/innovations-50y.test.js && node test/improvements-pack.test.js && node test/marketing-innovations.test.js && node test/secret-leak-scan.test.js && node test/commerce-stack.test.js && node test/commerce-stage567.test.js && node test/polish-pack.test.js && node test/site-stability-guard.test.js && node test/billion-scale-modules.test.js && node test/topology.test.js && node test/site-auth-e2e.test.js && node test/enterprise-ready.test.js && node test/cloud-providers.test.js && node test/disaster-recovery-local.test.js && node test/password-reset-email.test.js && node test/crypto-bridge.test.js && node test/predictive-prefetch.test.js && node test/rum-beacons.test.js && node test/legacy-baseline-mode.test.js
scripts.prepare: sh -c 'cd .. && if [ -d .git ]; then git config core.hooksPath .husky && echo "husky hooks configured"; else echo "husky skipped (no .git)"; fi'
scripts.innovation:sprint: node -e "const ai = require('./backend/modules/autonomousInnovation'); console.log('[SPRINT]', JSON.stringify(ai.getStatus())); if (typeof ai.stopInnovationCycle === 'function') ai.stopInnovationCycle(); process.exit(0);"
scripts.innovation:report: node -e "const ai = require('./backend/modules/autonomousInnovation'); const m = ai.getDeploymentMetrics(); console.log('[REPORT] innovations:', m.totalInnovationsGenerated, '| deployed:', m.totalFeaturesDeployed, '| rate:', m.deploymentSuccessRate + '%'); if (typeof ai.stopInnovationCycle === 'function') ai.stopInnovationCycle(); process.exit(0);"
